$Comment: Boss CAE for the Warden, Phase 2 (sub-50% HP). Same SelectBasicAttackTarget evaluator as Phase 1 but with a longer melee reach and a tighter run window so the boss presses harder once enraged. The Blight-add SUMMONS are driven from Java (BossController) rather than a CAE State/SubState action, because this Warden role does not replicate the Goblin_Duke arena instruction tree that the native Spawn action targets - see the boss/ package. Ids renamed to the KweebecNightmare namespace; structure cloned from CAE_Goblin_Duke_Phase_1.
